# Search for any Workers.xlsx or workers-related parquet in the project
project = Path(''c:/Users/quang/CRC Code/ExcelIngestion'')
print(''Workers Excel files:'')
for f in project.rglob(''*[Ww]orker*.xlsx''):
    print(f''  {f.relative_to(project)}'')

print()
print(''Workers parquet files:'')
for f in project.rglob(''*[Ww]orker*.parquet''):
    print(f''  {f.relative_to(project)}'')

print()
